title: Parent Workflow: Compliance Audit (Orchestrator)
description: Orchestrates the full compliance audit lifecycle. Sequences child workflows, handles notifications, and optionally triggers remediation. Entry point for both manual and scheduled runs.

slack_webhook_url.description: Slack incoming webhook URL for scan summary notification

email_recipients.description: Distribution list for PDF + CSV report delivery

remediation_enabled.description: If true, triggers Remediate Device child for non-compliant devices that have a remediation_hint defined

scan_id.description: Unique identifier for this scan run

execution_order: 7. [if remediation_enabled] childJob loop → Compliance - Remediate Device (per non-compliant device with remediation_hint)
9. mailWithAdvancedFields (email adapter) → PDF + CSV to email_recipients

trigger_defaults.description: Values used by the OperationsManager weekly trigger (Compliance Audit - Weekly)
trigger_defaults.note: slack_webhook_url and email_recipients are stored as trigger parameters
